lines: You wake up in your father's farmhouse like you do every day. But something is different than usual...
You find an old kitchen knife and some potatoes. If you want to know more about the objects, press the D key in the inventory.
KITCHEN KNIVES=W001=333=You can use this knife as a weapon. Select it and press key B.
POTATOES=C005=334=Some fresh potatoes. If you want to eat them, use the B button.
You take the book with you.
BOOK=0010=379=--The teachings of the wise Confucius-- They say that many things lie hidden on the banks of some cities.
A candle eke out its existence on the small table.
A strange glowing mushroom... Do you want to take it with you?
I would recommend you try your luck on the southeastern shore of the lake. Between the reed banks there are suitable victims of your kind.
Your father found this flower in the woods a few years ago.
Full of anticipation, she opens the chest... but inside there is only a small, brown book and a misshapen piece of stone.
DIARY=U861=379=This is your father's diary. If you use it with the B key, you can view your next order.
You should urgently listen to your father.
Your long-standing shoe collection. You look at them with pride and satisfaction.
A beautifully designed closet. But when you open it, you find nothing.
You can pull out the flower.
MEADOW FLOWER=F001=324=A not particularly rare flower.
You feel the bridge shaking... and part of it collapsing.
You use the wooden beam profitably.
You will find some gold pieces here.
The sounds come from there...yes, right over there in the forest.
There's no point in using the ax here.
You discover a hidden entrance into the forest.
I sell you all kinds of things.
Welcome to Kanderburgh; the city with the magnificently waving flag. Here you will find everything your heart desires.
I need your help. Do you want to listen to me?
I am always looking for different types of flowers. If you find any, bring them to me. I will reward you for that too.
Then get away. You have nothing else to look for here.
These beautiful flowers seem to grow everywhere here. You can't pick them by hand.
You have never seen this special flower before. Even with a shovel you cannot harm the deep roots of this plant.
You can snatch the flower from Mother Nature with your sickle.
GRUNISA=F500=325=A very special genus of flowers.
You emerge from your bed fresh and rested.
Let me see what you found.
These beautiful flowers seem to grow everywhere here. You can't pick them by hand.
You can remove the flower from the ground.
KITSCH ROSE=F002=446=Occurs frequently in these areas.
You can remove the flower from the ground.
COMERCIAL VIOLETS=F003=447=Found in every flower meadow.
The quality of my weapons is great.
SHORT SWORD=W005=373=This small sword has a decorated handle.
WAR AX=W008=380=No forester would use this heavy axe. Rather, it is forged for the craft of war.
OMIN BLADE=W013=369=Feared by the enemy, honored by the wearer.
PRIMARY AX OF GORGOTH=W018=356=The warlord Gorgoth himself wielded this weapon at the Battle of Aturgan.
I found a lot of Gristalle today.....hehe
The Mensengeslegen has great things to expect from the Swergen.
-Axel's Brockenstube- You can sell your old goods here for good money. I've also recently started running a tool department.
Greetings. You can spend the night here and refresh your strength.
Here, take this bottle of gray beer.
GRAUBIER=0004=372=This beer is a strong variety.
Here, take this bottle of Burgbier.
BURGBIER=0002=371=This beer doesn't smell particularly good.
Here, take this bottle of blood wine.
BLOOD WINE=C002=370=This bottle of wine is of very noble origin.
These bushes have spines on their branches.
You can dig up the bush.
THORN BUSH=U087=022=You dug up this bush with your shovel.
You can plant the bush here.
You can't use the bush here.
Time is running out because my life will soon be over. I already feel death approaching. Now you have to listen to me carefully.

Now I have to tell you something that will probably surprise you. Although I worked on the farm here, I am not a farmer and neither was your grandfather. Haven't you wondered what lies outside the island we live on?
All my life I have been looking for this country that we do not know. And I found out a lot, things I shouldn't know...
I had woken something up and a dark force began to haunt me. I retreated here, thinking I was safe. But then, when you were just four, your mother disappeared and only I knew what had happened.

Since then I have lived in fear for you, my son. I didn't want to put this burden on you before it was necessary, but now it's time. I will die soon and you shall complete my work. Perhaps you will see the land and gain the freedom that I was not granted.

Go to the basement and look for a key. He will open the chest that contains my manuscripts. There you will find everything that could be useful to you in your search. Then hurry to Kanderburgh. My friend Otto is waiting for you there. But be careful....the enemy is lurking everywhere........ NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOW- They are coming!
You can hardly believe it, but your father is dead.
A hairy, ugly and quite large rat.
RAT TAIL=0001=374=These rat tails smell ugly.
In front of you you see some rats. Maybe you should be careful and take a weapon. You can use an object in the inventory by pressing the B key.

The battle takes place on a special map. You and your opponents move in round mode. If you touch one of the enemies, the battle menu will appear. There you can choose your combat actions. You can also leave the battle map and flee the battle.
You must be the son of your father. Yes, I see his eyes in your face.
Say, how can I help you?
My name is Alatur. To protect myself from the dark forces that pursue me, I call myself Otto. I was your father's companion for a long time. But when we encountered disaster, we had to separate.
I don't want to tell you anything about it as long as you don't need to know about it.

Four runes are needed to open the portal, which opens the way to the real world. It is probably on the island of Nerebrod, as ancient writings suggest. The four runes are scattered throughout the island. I hereby give you the scroll that cost your father his life.
RUNE DIRECTORY=U000=442=One lies in the dark, one lies in the light. The miller's man has the third one, but no one knows the fourth one.
The island of Nerebrod lies west of here. You should visit her sometime.
Your goal is to get the four rune stones. Look around the island and talk to the people. Maybe they will help you. First I would visit the dwarven city.
Goodbye and all the best. You are always welcome here.
You want to get into the back yard of the building there? Then you have to bring me a beer so that I can help you. But remember, I don't settle for cheap goods.
Please bring me the beer first! But remember, I won't settle for cheap Burgbier.
Thank you, I will now have the door opened for you.
This altar goes well with the beautifully decorated church.
God protect my sheep and be angry with the wolves.
EMERALD=0040=377=A valuable stone. If you sell it you will definitely get a lot of gold.
Hehe...I can brew you a magic potion. Bring me seven rat tails and three spider legs.
You don't have the ingredients together yet.
A painting lies at your feet.
You will find a key in a niche in the stone.
There is a scroll hanging in the thorns of the bush.
SCROLL=0010=375=In the left tree of the twin dream, you have to split to find what only a few knew about.
You split the bark of the fir tree and lo and behold...a sword appears.
WHISTLE=U000=378=The familiar smell reaches your nostrils.
You need a key to open this door.
However, the ax is gone. You throw them away.
WEAK HEALING POTION=C004=347=This potion heals four health points.
Yep! I knew you were a friend of the city! Here... I'll show you something. You can use this tool to plan the room.
ROOM PLANNING VECTOR=E155=448=You are now able to plan the space.
Hi, Fremda. How do you like our cool city? Not bad, right?
You have to know that there are many critics. Many speak of a stain.
You don't seem to be very overconfident.
Yeah, that's my opinion too. But tell me, what do you think about the plants in front of the gun shop? Is there nothing that can be done?
You explore a square meter of ground and find 2 huge, 6 large and three small stones.
You explore a square meter of ground and find 12 large stones and 2 mini stones.
You explore a square meter of ground and find 7 medium-sized stones.
A hairy, ugly and quite large spider.
Grethe is 84 years old. The youngest of the three of us was twice as young as the oldest 38 years ago.
I am 6 years younger than the oldest.
My name is Anette. How old am I?
Saali. My name is stupid! I'm more of a supporter here. What wow?
Nope, I'm not the same as you.
It's just like the old days, but you can't fight back. But watch it, Momou.
Yes, that is a very useful skill. There, every soil size, wode wosch. Hello, I love that!
Give me that thing. Here it is, Laddli.
I'm calling number for a game. Bring öbbis to calm down; That's why I'm a bit nervous.
You open the drawer of the table, but find nothing
SUPPLIES=C003=389=The last supplies of the harsh winter.
ATTENTION! Enter at your own risk
You need the church key to open this door.
Be careful. Many monsters live under the cursed ground. And when one sees the light, I don't want to be in its field of vision...
My property, my mill, my field!!! Unauthorized entry is punishable by contempt of death. -The miller-
Crush me... Do you have anything for me?
Why are you talking to me? Weigh the gear... After all, I have no anger at all.
There is nothing to be found in this drawer.
You enter the dark cave suspiciously.
The light is already waiting for you.
An unknown plane appears in the light of the outside world.
Mom said I wasn't allowed to talk to strangers.
I'm not allowed to talk to strangers.
Go away! I'm not allowed to talk to you.
I won't talk to you anymore!
Hello, my dearest of all children
Would you give me your teddy bear?
I won't say anything more now!
Nooo, I got this from my mother for my birthday.
I hate slimers most of all!
That's her! Do you know her? Then you are no longer a stranger...
Sorry, I can't help you... I just saw this brooch lying on the grass.
BROOCH=U000=410=A brooch. The owner probably already misses her.
I've told you everything I know... You should go find the owner of the brooch.
It seems like they convinced the dog. You should try to capture him...
You put the dog in your inventory... (Wasn't that in a game before?)
DOG=U000=411=Hopefully the dog will help you later.
You will find some gold pieces here.
Not everything is what it seems...
As soon as the dwarf sees your brooch, he pounces on it.
We Swergen are a proud people.
With this Smugstüg you have bought the Gontagt to become a Swergenvolg. Spregt with my master, who is staying in the inn with a dripping wine jug.
The footsteps of the wise Confucius can still be seen here.

You are venerable and honored. You have the spirit of a swerg. This is how you shall obtain Sugang su our village. May we meet again there... Here. Take the slogan. Guard them like the apple of your eye!
My servant has corrected me otherwise... Lies to me!
The inscription shimmers in golden letters: -To the dripping wine jug-
Lars' weapons are my favorites. Note the steely shimmer that surrounds the blade like an aura.
In the distance you hear knocking noises.
A cave opens up in front of you.
You take your father's sandals with you. He probably doesn't need it anymore...
SANDALS=B001=403=These sandals provide lightweight protection for your precious toes.
Stand in front of the slinky drummer.
Defeat the merchant. He sells a lot of useful things.
I'm selling armor. Do you need wedges?
CHAIN MAIL=A006=341=A finely crafted chain mail shirt. The name of the manufacturer is noted on the inside.
SWAMP SHIELD OF BHAAL=S026=329=The Lord of Death once used this shield.
I am the RIGHT hand of the Swergenmaster.
I am the LEFT hand of the Swergenmaster......psst...do you want some Swergenweed?
SEVERE HEMP=E242=416=You probably know what to do...
I am the LEFT hand of the Swergenmaster.
You enjoy the effects of the herb.
I'll tell my sisters about your success right away.
Mathilde says that you are a true genius. Grethe is also enthusiastic.
Say the slogan. Otherwise you won't get anything.
The dwarf seems to nod his head, but he doesn't let you pass. The slogan doesn't seem to be entirely true.
The dwarf grimaces and glares at you.
Hello. I am the local shepherd. I'm sooooo bored. The only exciting thing is those sounds from the forest over there.
Thank you very much. I finally have a dog to look after my sheep. But I still have a problem: it's haunted over there in the forest.
Can't you give me something to do?
(You hear a voice...) Get out of the field!
You are the swag to survive against the drummer. Trains up to level 4.
Run out of luck. You are prepared enough.
(the goblin) I warn you, don't go into these caves until you reach level 7.
OK, if you can't help it.
PICKAXE=E413=428=A stable tool. From dwarves for dwarves.
If you want to sell your objects, it is crucial who you contact.
Use the SPACEBAR to speed up the flow of text. Use the ENTER key to carry out actions. Try the room door.
With ESC you get to the main menu. The I key takes you to your inventory, which you can get rid of with ESC.

There are bloody sticks immortalized on the inside wall of the cupboard. You burden yourself with the content. From now on you can save with the S key. For the sake of completeness you are able to use L of the shop.
The dead head is looking forward to the food it has found.
He guards the bridge with fervor.
GREEN POTION=C007=389=Donate seven LPs to the consumer.
A remarkable monument. You can feel his magical aura.
You uncover a long sword in the chest.
What was wrong? Why are you talking back to me?
Oooooooooh, you have a cute puppy with you... Will you give it to me?
In the dark you see cunning eyes sparkling.
You find few remaining gold pieces.
CASTLE SIGN=S007=365=Standard equipment for a guardsman.
Without ID you have no access.
Buy a shovel early. There are many things hidden beneath our feet.
Have you already tasted all the drinks in the pub? The innkeeper delivers certain drinks exclusively to regular customers.
Use the sickle to cut the plants that you cannot dig up.
Dwarves are a nation unto themselves. Especially their language... When you are in contact with them, always pay attention to correct articulation.
The weaponsmith Lars offers you a wide range.
The weather is particularly wonderful today.
The priest is a (censored)! Everything I confessed to him was distributed (censored) by the priest in the city...
Have you heard? Olaf is supposed to..., well, rumor has it... The priest whispered to me...
We have a miserable time in our city. All Schmendelers and Mendelers.
I can't help you any more.
You'll find tons of dwarven coins here.
PILE OF COINS=U000=427=1000 Dwarven Coins per pile.

Here you are finally. We need your help. A silly drummer besieges our gold. Go to the Satsgammer and put an end to the beast. Dog sounds very sour: You can only defeat the drummer when you have risen to level 4...
Love what we have to offer you! Kill him!
Give me the gopf! I tell you something.
The dwarven master examines the bloody drummer's head in detail. Finally he reaches into the braincase and brings out a stone. It is not without dignity that he hands this to you.
DRUM STONE=U000=387=One of the four runestones. How did he get into his head?
Greetings. Interested in powerful equipment? Gostenpungt: 9,151 Münsen (excl. VAT 8.8%)... *sum, sum* 10,000 Münsen is appropriate.
You're missing out on the moment of your life.
The dwarf hands you a bundle.
DRUM BUTCHER SET=E328=417=A large bundle with dwarven runes on the top.
In order to defeat the drummer, there is no patent answer. But I have a cleaner that will help you.
Would you like to leave our beautiful settlement early, burdened with the sword?
It is a useful gift, his wounds can be healed by the battle itself. Here, take this divine healing potion. But you can only use it once.
GOD'S DRINK=C050=453=Donate fifty LPs to its consumer.
You can't support more than that.
A hairy, ugly and quite large spider.
She looks at you with her thousand eyes.
POISON GLAND=0075=423=Suitable for sale at most.
POWERFUL BAT SWINGS=0020=422=These wings were hard won.
I'll give you flour right away, you parasite!
The miller fled back to his mill.
METEORITE=U357=419=The bluish shimmering fragment of a celestial body.
You won't be able to see the observatory.
You push the celestial body into the crack that adorns the bark of the planetarium.
You shove the piece up your butt... It feels cool. But it doesn't work out in the long run and is no longer fashionable these days anyway.
You enter the building full of awe.
Horrible creatures rise from the dirt
Horrible creatures rise to the surface between the bones.
This pillar looks like something needs to be put on it...
This pillar looks like something needs to be put on it...
This pillar looks like something needs to be put on it...
This pillar looks like something needs to be put on it...
-IN MEMORY OF- knight HELMut, the slipper cobbler Bert and numerous drunkards. All these men drowned miserably in that lake. Their remains still adorn the grounds today.
The runestones have all been placed correctly... Teleport is now possible.
Finally! You have found one of the runestones.
Apparently one of the runes again.
LUMINOUS STONE=U000=385=It seems as if the stone has absorbed the light from the lighthouse.
You receive evil looks as a tribute to your unbecoming behavior... Nevertheless, you let a pinch of strong tobacco run along.
STRONG TOBACCO=0003=441=This tobacco is one of the strongest, if not the strongest!
Petri Heil bold wanderer. Guess my profession.
Do you know anything about fishing?
Don't you want to compete with me, do you?
I know a secret fishing place where only the masters of my trade frequent. Bring me 6 baits (regardless of quality) and return...
Thanks, now get 6 more baits that you can then use yourself.
Hehe, just kidding. But wait… something is still missing.
You still need a fishing rod.
You can't be in your right mind to enter this darkest of holes...
You are able to escape disaster
I sense a diminished activity of evil here. We will manage to escape here.
The entrance to the dungeon has been blocked.
The passage seems to be blocked, but you still get on...
A hairy, ugly and quite large spider.
A few bats attack you from the ceiling of the dungeon.
You don't think it makes sense to dig up the entire dungeon.
Use the pickaxe to dig a passage.
The first brother is the fresh and renewing one.
The second brother is the hot and temperamental one.
The third brother is the starving and perishable one.
The fourth brother is the cold and closed one.
Quite right. Passage is granted to you.
Very good, my boy... Just turn now and I'll be outside.
Thank you my boy, come on, let's leave these shores.
MAGICIAN=E440=217=The magician has cast a shrinking spell on himself and now requires you to carry him around.
You saved me, my boy. I will now end your quest to come to this island.
Will you grant me three wishes?
Ridiculous... I'm the greatest magician on Irdeni! Mind reading is a small thing.
I will now use my power to cast a constant rainbow over the sea so that you can get across to Nerebrod... Farewell, my boy. We will meet again.
Do I look like I'm a fairy?
I can't help you here, boy.
Hehe... Here I am again. I told you we would see each other again. But now I say goodbye.
Obviously, violence is of no use here. Try communication.
The crunching of the door hinges is unmistakable.
Obviously, violence is of no use here. Try communication.
The crunching of the door hinges is unmistakable.
Obviously, violence is of no use here. Try communication.
The crunching of the door hinges is unmistakable.
The door can be opened easily from this side.
The door cannot be opened from this side.
The door can be opened easily from this side.
The door cannot be opened from this side.
A reddish ray descends on your head. Apparently you got the wrong coffin.
You don't dare touch this coffin again.
APOLLO'S AMPHORE=U000=456=Filled with a viscous liquid.
What in Hades' name are you doing in these halls?!?
Would you like to know what?
Nana... not so rude. Don't anger Zeus with your behavior.
Just a descendant of the great race of Transylvania. Some of the most noble vampires preferred to make their home in the warm south. I was also attracted to the wine.
Blaspicious, shameful alcohol. I have given myself to you since the night of my wife's death. (turns to you)
I love wine above all other liquids. That's why I was expelled from the guild. My passion was more for the fermenting drink than for the pulsating blood. My supplies are running low.
Please bring me my last bottle. She's in the fifth coffin. But be warned. Don't be fooled by the numbers. One mistake would be your ruin.
Thank you for your noble deed. I hereby present you with this winch. Compatible with all Irdenian wells.
The vampire gives in to his passion.
What do you want to do here with a CABLE WINCH?
You insert the winch into its intended location on the well frame.
What do you want to do with a BUCKET here?
You bring something up from the well.
POWER BRACELET=U000=459=The bracelet of the Zelda hero Link. What a privilege to be able to wear this bracelet... But how did it end up in the well?
Your winch is doing very well.
The king's sword has adorned the stone Kalibur for thousands of years. The Incalibur engraving enhances the weapon's otherwise seemingly poor pommel.
The knight bows to you. You see how the inscription on the sword changes. From now on it is called 'Excalibur'.
Before you you see Arthur's much-sung sword
You can snatch the sword away from Kalibur with the help of your power bracelet. As you carefully place the blade into your shaft, Kalibur lets out an audible groan.
Your interest fades and you turn away.
You need another utensil to lower the bucket into the well.
You are not qualified to carry the Excalibur.
You can hardly reconcile yourself to ramming this magical sword into the door. Nevertheless you do it and again a holy relic is lost.
Now you are ready! Comes with...
Before you you see my kingdom, which from now on will also serve your needs. Stand on the bank and use your rod. But choose your hunting location carefully.
Try to cast your rod in open water if possible.
Nobody fishes as well as me. Look there in the cauldron at what gems I've already caught.
Oh, you want to go fishing again...
Hands off! This is MY loot.
There are no fish to be found here.
You fish an old slipper out of the lake.
You pull a rusty helmet ashore.
You poor inexperienced fishing boy. You probably don't have much idea about the fishing trade. Here, take this little perch as a gift.
...and what did you see? - you saw the secret pond of the fishermen's guild?!? I can't believe you.
We have been envying the fishermen's guild for their beautiful earnings for a long time. It was rumored that they had a hidden freshwater pond in the middle of a forest.
Do you want to help us find it?
Bring us proof that you found the pond.
That's a gem! This bass can only come from the pond in question... Take this key as a thank you.
IRON KEY=U000=338=The first key of the lighthouse.
Now we can finally give Heiko from the Fishermen's Guild a run for his money.
I am Timo the ignorant one. Ask Gunnar if you want to know something.
An iron keyhole. What might it serve?
What a miracle. The gate opens.
You vaguely remember your former home...
You've come to me right on time. I need a trustworthy messenger who can deliver a letter to me... Unfortunately, I cannot do the task myself because my wife is seriously ill. Do you want to help me?
Then my wife will take care of you in the meantime! You have to take care of them... Here, take the chamber key.
So take this message and do not return with it!
FILIGREE PARCHMENT=0001=432=Delicate writing decorates the cover.
Oh yes, I forgot that because of all the excitement. Take the letter to my secret lover. I expect absolute discretion!
I guess I'll have to search you so I can see the truth.
What do we have here? You lied to me! But now quickly, little messenger... Bring the letter to my beloved.
I couldn't find anything that could prove your infidelity. Here take this key as proof of my thanks.
Look there. You also bring me a rose from my beloved Anke. I appreciate that.
And here take this key as further proof of my thanks.
I'm so sad. My lover had to leave me. His wife drove the wedge.
Oooooooooooooooooh, how sweet of you... Here you have a rose as a thank you. You can keep them to yourself. 
ROSE=U000=433=A prickly flower. Probably a cactus-like plant.
YOU are my most beloved. Just stay a while.
My husband is cheating. But he keeps accusing me of my affair with the priest. After all, I was young once too.
Please return this church key to the priest. And tell him that I'm still sorry.
Please grant me this wish before I pass away...
You open the chest... A bright ribbon lies inside. It is marked by magical runes.
CLERIC RIBBON=E580=437=This ribbon gives its wearer access to a secret chapel. You have to be within the city.
The Cleric's Ribbon carries you away.
The tape is of no use here.
Pretty deep... In any case, you don't want to risk a hasty fall.
Using the rope here makes no sense.
You lower yourself into the grave.
You lower yourself into the grave.
You lower yourself into the grave.
You lower yourself into the grave.
You walk among the living again.
Friend... You shouldn't go into the devil's cave when evil is still there. Hear my words. Many have already preferred pride to their own life, which does not belong to me.
Nobody listens to me... (snif) And yet I only mean well for those who are said to be dead.
Your unprofessional behavior will trigger a lightning trap. You lose some of your life points!
Trembling, you are still able to retrieve the treasure.
FIRST VOLUME=U000=443=Confucian monk training: hand-to-hand combat

You open the coffin and are amazed. Strangely enough, there are two skeletons in the coffin. One is well-preserved and equipped in war gear. You take possession of the objects. You find an ore helmet.
ARCHELM=H008=395=The original owner of this helmet was unable to escape the disaster.
You find a pair of knight's boots.
KNIGHT BOOTS=B010=404=The original owner of these boots bit the dust too soon.
ARMOR=A015=328=The original owner of this armor failed in his endeavor.
Your unprofessional behavior sets off a fire trap. You lose some of your life points!
Trembling, you are still able to retrieve the treasure.
SECOND VOLUME=U000=443=Confucian monk training: beast taming
Your unprofessional behavior triggers an Indy trap. You lose some of your life points!
Trembling, you are still able to retrieve the treasure.
Greetings. I only started my monk training last year. My thirst for knowledge is unquenched. Bring me MORE learning resources!!!
Thank you very much... I will go to the study room immediately. Goodbye, brother.
Greetings. I began my monastic training three years ago. My thirst for knowledge is always unquenched. Bring me MORE learning resources!!!
Thank you very much... I will go to the study room immediately. Goodbye, brother.
Greetings. I began my monastic training five years ago. My thirst for knowledge is still unquenched. Bring me MORE learning resources!!!
Thank you very much... I will go to the study room immediately. Goodbye, brother. And so I don't forget...
The monk master awaits you at the main portal and here...
My apprentice told me about your exploits. You are a virtuous young man. Say, do you want to serve God?
I have other things to do.
Then from now on you will be a priest of the light and may always do deeds under its light. Here, take this robe. I wish you all the best.
MONK'S ROBE=0375=444=A gift from the head monk.
Blaspicious rat. Defile these halls no longer. Henceforth!
This is a valid argument. May God watch over you. You are always welcome.
Are you crazy? Do you want to challenge me? Here, take this! (throws fireball)
I see. You have a High Monastery Robe with you. I would pay you a fortune. What do you think about 1000 gold pieces?
At most 1,500... The robe isn't worth more to me.
Are you crazy? No one would pay such a sum.
The priest doesn't seem to pay any attention to you anymore. He is engrossed in a Bible text.
The marble altar stone creates a mystical atmosphere.
Udo's war equipment purchase. I buy everything you no longer need.
Company holidays. The innkeeper is not present.
You won't be able to overcome this obstacle without the right utensils.
When you pull the lever, the wall behind you moves.
The lever can no longer be moved.
Sain's grins. What's the problem? Are you stuck? Yes, please take the key here. (The spirit disappears from your eyes)
You put the key in the recess created for it.
My name is Balthazar. I am the local shoemaker.
SHOES OF THE MANITU=B002=449=Hello. Does it seem stupid? There are only two Gschigg...
ANGEL FEET=B016=407=You feel like you are in seventh heaven.
PALADINS BOOTS=B019=409=Shimmering in gold, they give the dawn an eternal shine.
Good day. Do you need magical potions?
HEALING DRINK=C001=452=This potion heals one life point. With tube and vitamin C.

Good day. Do you wish to buy various junk?
TOBACCO=0005=441=This tobacco is one of the strongest, but not the strongest.
SEVERE HEMP=E242=416=You probably know what to do...
MEADOW FLOWER=F001=324=A not particularly rare flower.
CRAP=0003=458=A piece of crap. What else did you expect?
UNIVERSAL CARD=E851=463=The island of Nerebrod is even shown on the map.
Just don't like any nonsense! We dare about our goods. Steles are prohibited.
Greetings. Would you like to examine my helmets?
Hello to your service. Which Grieg device do you like the most?
BASTWAMS=A002=360=This light armor seems pretty comfortable.
NAGA ARMOR=A020=359=The silver metal of the Naga Queen adorns the surface.
CASTLE SIGN=S007=365=Standard equipment for a guardsman.
IRON ROUND SHIELD=S010=364=From the dwarven forge.
SHIELD JAKOBI=S014=343=Saint James carried this shield in the Second Crusade.
The ants work hard. You discover a glittering something in the middle of the crowd, but you don't dare reach into the pile with your bare hands. A stalk of the Müllerfeld would be useful here.
Why do you plan to use the straw here?
With a little tact, you cleverly poke around in the pile so that you end up with a ruby in your hands.
HALM=0005=414=You have already paid it off.
The miller is a miser. He lives alone in his mill and doesn't want to be disturbed. Don't you dare harm his property!
Our mayor is fat. He doesn't care about any of us.
There is an annoying ant infestation on the island. Does that have something to do with the mild winter?
Our village is known for its wide range of goods. Feel free to look around.
Looking for tools? Then you are better off in Kanderburgh.
Be warned: The junk dealer Fridolin makes his profit from stolen goods.
The rumor mill is churning. It is rumored that there is a secret dwarven settlement in the mountains. Where else do they get their goods from?
Not much is known about Nerebrod. If the weather conditions are good, you can see a tower.
Always equip yourself with potions before battle.
Goblins are not to be trusted. Beware of their dishonest chatter.
Tags too. Are you seeking the advice of a dignitary?
Evil figure in the next room?
Do you know how to do a headstand?
This information is taboo for outsiders and of no use anyway.
For 250 GS I will try it. Do you want to enjoy the spectacle?
Unfortunately you can't pay me. Goes away...
So, I think you've had enough fun.
It takes a lot of effort to create a new and fake passport. However, if you get me a nice painting in return, we'll start talking.
How beautiful it is. Here take the fake trade passport and be happy.
TRADING PASS=U000=455=The mayor had it made.
You will find some coins in the drawer.
You must make a weighty sacrifice to pass through my wings.
Do you have the strength to stand behind this door?
Then the path is open to you.
As far as I know, insecurity is not a chivalrous virtue. Train hard and then come back.
Then continue preparing for the challenge.
Do you have the skills to survive behind this door?
Then the path is open to you.
As far as I know, insecurity is not a chivalrous virtue. Train hard and then come back.
Then continue preparing for the challenge. You won't survive with your attitude.
You find large amounts of gold.
You find a lot of gold.
You find a lot of gold.
I'll sell you bait at a good price so you don't have to buy it yourself.
Weapons made from sword steel have the best quality.
TITAN AX=W017=357=From the forge of the titans.
IRON OF THE UROGS=W024=366=Screams for blood.
My name is Thilo. I'll buy from you all the items you've grown tired of.
...take this golden key as a thank you.
GOLDEN KEY=U000=336=Made from the finest metal.
The sickle has become jagged. You'd better sell them again.
The cleric bond vanishes into thin air. Apparently you don't need it anymore.
There is a sickle in the chest. You take them.
You find yourself in the cemetery.
You take on the poisonous spiders.
A hairy, ugly and poisonous spider.
You take on the huge poisonous spider.
A hairy, ugly and also poisonous mother animal.
Using the sickle here borders on madness!
As you cut off a stalk, the miller steps out of HIS mill, snorting loudly.
HALM=U670=414=A straw... you keep it as a trophy. May he bring you happiness.
What comes to mind? Are you out of your mind?
Impudence! First ruin the harvest, then act unruly. I can't accept that. You should take a look at the Müller etiquette... That was really strong stuff!
You know how to calm me down. I'm not mad at you anymore.
I'll give you flour right away, you parasite!
Indeed. The mill no longer turns. A gear in the transmission is broken and requires a carpenter's hand to patch it back together.
Get me a new wooden gear.
I don't need a servant. But you could do me a service.
Will you give me your gear?
You should be happy. I don't give everyone as much gifts as you.

Hello. Finally someone frees me from this dark dungeon. I am eternally grateful to you. Until now I have been held captive by the evil wizard Arthur. With the help of a naive hero, he was able to escape his prison and is now planning new crimes.
This evil, evil magician is not one to be trifled with... Beware of him.
Arthur has been imprisoned in a dungeon in the darkest dungeon on Irdeni for centuries. Numerous trained creatures were supposed to prevent the magician from escaping.
I don't want to hear any more.
The most reserved hero in the history of Irdenis defeated the dead head and freed the terrible magician. Immediately afterwards Arthur banished me here.
I don't want to know anything.

Eeeehmmm... Because... because I threatened his existence... He often appeared at children's birthday parties to impress them with magic tricks. I disputed this business with him. He wasn't used to competition.
That's why you're stewing down here?
Can you conjure up a rabbit for me?
I want to see a card trick.
This powerful magician can transform into any shape. He is capable of anything.
Unworthy!!! The mighty Arthur doesn't bother with such shenanigans! So face me again and you will fail miserably.
You decide to hang around on the upper world for now.
You did very well, my boy. I congratulate. You saved Irdeni from his impending fate. Oh, by the way... Stulz sends his regards. Take care and farewell.
You write an entry in your diary.
I have to go see Otto von Kanderburgh, my father's friend. He helps me further.
You write an entry in your diary.
I have to find a way into the dwarven city. Maybe the dwarven master can help me.
You write an entry in your diary.
I heard of a magician who is said to be trapped in a cave. I should find this wall.
GOBLINA AX=0004=465=The owner is still attached to his axe.
Oh father, I would have had a lot to say to you... We could have gone on many adventures together. But even without you...
Finally your father can rest in peace. You have banished the dark shadow from his face. Come on, let's bury him.
What's going on here? Should that be the end? You're not serious, are you?!? You can't inflict this conclusion on the players!...
What are you staring at stupidly???
The statue doesn't hesitate for long and leans forward... A shiver comes over you.
What do you want? Do you inform yourself? See, I'm busy!
The powerful magician who has kept Irdeni in suspense for years.
